hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$root\dist\hooks\activate.mjs" }
$root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$root\dist\hooks\subagent.mjs" }
$root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } else { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT }; if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$root\dist\hooks\mode-tracker.mjs" }
